scenarios: 027-interactive-cli-experience.feature:Setup-stage progress shows each stage as its own live status, not one fixed spinner
027-interactive-cli-experience.feature:Interactive start closes with a concise human summary, not the machine check list
027-interactive-cli-experience.feature:A completed interactive start closes by naming the live store and the remaining human step
027-interactive-cli-experience.feature:Interactive start previews the plan, and Enter accepts every default
027-interactive-cli-experience.feature:The Saleor sign-in URL is shown as a clickable terminal hyperlink
002-v1-end-to-end-saleor-cloud-storefront.feature:A missing pnpm prerequisite is reported as a clean check, not a raw spawn error
004-jolly-configurator-starter-recipe.feature:Jolly start confirms the recipe's featured collection exists before reporting the recipe stage completed
